title: Intro
description: Please HELP! Many of your kinfolk throughout your kindom are in need of your assistance. Follow these questful instructions, overcome the bewitching challenges, choose wisely, and you shall be eternally rewarded.

title: Requirements
description: For your quest you need cookies. Find the cookies.
confirmationText: We have a plate of cookies.

title: Choose
description: You have two options. Which do you choose?

title: Enjoy
description: Enjoy your cookies.

title: Clue
description: "To dream I'd find romance"
adminExplaination: This is a quote from Frozen. When Anna is singing, a painting is shown. What is the name of the painting?

title: Choose
description: You have two options. Which do you choose?

title: Answer
description: Who will it be?

title: Slide
description: The chosen person slides down the slide 6.5 times.
adminExplaination: Perform the activity and take a picture of them doing it. They must take a picture of them doing it to move on.

title: Slide
description: Everyone slide down the slide at the same time together.
adminExplaination: Perform the activity and take a picture of them doing it. They must take a picture of them doing it to move on.

title: Well done!
description: Now go here
adminExplaination: This is the Aaron home location

title: Answer
description: when ye are in the service of your fellow beings ye are only in the service of your

title: Service
description:
Do at least 3 of these things for the people that live here: 
Sweep the floors, 
Mop the floors, 
Clean windows, 
Take out the trash, 
or Homeowner’s choice

title: Cookie
description: Give them a few cookies if you have some

title: Well done!
description: Now go here
adminExplaination: This is the Aaron home's culdasac

title: Dig
description: Your next clue is buried
adminExplaination: They should dig and find a bag with paper and a QR code

title: Baptism notes
description: Write a note to someone who just got baptized. What would the savior say to someone that just got baptized?

title: Answer
description: Which princess would have done best following the star to Bethlehem?

title: Now go here
adminExplaination: This is the Northrup home location

title: Answer using FSY
description: How can I know if I’m feeling the Holy Ghost? Learning to be aware of the Spirit takes
adminExplaination: p19 of the strength of youth

title: Dropoff
description: Drop off your notes in their mailbox. Also drop off some cookies if you have some.

title: Choose
description: You have two options. Which do you choose?

options.text: One person does something (it cannot be the same individual as the previous challenge if you chose that)

title: Answer
description: Who will it be? (it cannot be the same individual as the previous challenge if you chose that)

title: Jump
description: One person must jump over everyoone else.
adminExplaination: Perform the activity and take a picture of them doing it. They must take a picture of them doing it to move on.

title: Pyramid
description: Form a human pyramid.
adminExplaination: Perform the activity and take a picture of them doing it. They must take a picture of them doing it to move on.

title: Answer
description: Which princess loves the story of Jonah?

title: Watch & Answer
description: How many Os are in the snake? (hint: watch more than the first 10s)

title: Service
description:
Do at least 3 of these things for the people that live here: 
Read a child a book, 
Sweep the floors, 
Clean a mirror, 
Vacuum a room, 
or Homeowner’s choice

title: Cookie
description: Give them a few cookies if you have some

title: Answer
description: Choose the smallest person in the group

title: Pickup
description: You must carry them to the next waypoint

title: Answer
description: Which princess would understand Samson best?

title: Who said this to royalty?
description: there has not been such great faith among all the people

title: Service

Take out the trash,

or Homeowner’s choice
